evidence_label: doctor-facing branch question gate, not treatment advice

question_sequence.question: Is the private packet sufficient for any advanced-therapy branch discussion?
Are any standard-care, iron, immune, organ, infection, or safety blockers urgent before branch screening?
Which branch is in scope to discuss: allogeneic HCT, autologous gene-cell therapy, non-curative disease modification, standard-care stabilization, or benchmark-only tracking?
Which owner should answer next: transplant center, gene-cell therapy center, pharmacy/regulatory owner, payer, or standard-care hematology team?

decision_rule: The gate may be shared as a doctor-question frame only. It does not move Case-001 into any therapy, referral, trial, procurement, or sample workflow.
